channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: As Luigi Mangione's lawyers head to court, support grows for the accused 'vigilante'
item.description: Luigi Mangione's legal team is back in court in New York City this week for a key pretrial hearing. He's accused of stalking and killing an insurance executive.

item.title: As the U.S. turns 250, this historian has blunt advice: 'America has to grow up'
item.description: In America, U.S.A., Princeton historian Eddie Glaude Jr. looks at the country through the lens of its previous anniversaries and centennials.

item.title: Soccer Edition: Watch World Cup highlights from across the NPR Network
item.description: The 2026 World Cup is taking place in communities nationwide. NPR and member station journalists are in your city capturing the excitement.

item.title: Trump announces deal to end war in Iran. And, how to stay safe in deadly heat
item.description: Trump says a deal has been reached to end the U.S.-Iran war. Plus, what extreme temperatures do to the human body and how to stay safe.
